title: 99 Nights In The Forest
description: I am making a mod thats like 99 nights in the forest the roblox game but in minecraft it will start very simple and might have bugs
body:
99 Nights in the Forest (Minecraft Version)

A Minecraft recreation inspired by the Roblox game 99 Nights in the Forest. This mod brings core elements of the survival forest experience into Minecraft.

🌲 Features

- 🪓 The Axe: A basic tool for survival.
  
- 🪓 The Good Axe: A stronger upgrade for faster resource gathering.
  
- 🎒 Normal Sack: A storage item that holds up to 5 items.
   
- 🎒 Good Sack: A storage item that holds up to 15 items.
  
- 🦌 Deer: A forest animal to run from.

- 👦 Dino Kid: A kid that spawns around the map
🔥 Campfire Structure – A naturally generating forest structure inspired by the original game.

🎮 Gameplay

This mod is focused on simple survival mechanics inspired by the Roblox version. Gather resources, explore the forest, and survive the nights.

It works well in:

Survival worlds

Multiplayer servers

Forest-themed maps

📦 Version Support

Minecraft 1.21.1

Minecraft 1.21.8

Future updates depend on MCreator version support.
